headline: WTW completes acquisition of FlowStone Partners
summary: NEW YORK, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, today announced that it has completed the acquisition of FlowStone Partners, LLC, an alternative investment firm with highly specialized expertise in private equity secondaries for individual wealth and institutional clients. “We’re pleased to welcome FlowStone Partners to WTW as part of our Investments business,” said Julie Gebauer, President, Health, Wealth & Career, WTW. “

headline: Mega deals reach record high and propel surge in deal value, according to WTW
summary: Global M&A shrugs off high volatility and geopolitical noise, as the value of completed deals soar to five-year high of $438 billion – an increase of 155% in 12 monthsLONDON, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- M&A transactions of $10 billion or more have hit an all-time record in the first three months of 2026, according to research on completed deals from WTW’s Quarterly Deal Performance Monitor (QDPM). headline: Willis Towers Watson's Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Willis Towers Watson will release its first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.
